title: Vietnamese Sour Bhuna Cheese Fritters
description: A fusion of Indian and Vietnamese flavors in crispy cheese fritters with a tangy sour twist.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together rice flour, cheese, sesame oil, chili flakes, soy sauce, and salt.
Add the sour cream and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Divide the dough into 8 equal pieces.
Shape each piece into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk.
Heat a non-stick pan with a small amount of oil over medium heat.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Serve hot with chopped cilantro and green onions.
Enjoy with a dipping sauce of your choice.
